name: Explain the pipeline architecture
description: Agent should read pipeline code and explain how middleware steps are chained
task: Read the pipeline engine code at /project/src/pipeline/engine.ts and explain how middleware steps are chained together.

turns.text: The PipelineEngine uses a middleware pattern to chain steps. Steps are registered in order via `register()`. When `run()` is called, it creates a recursive `next` function that maintains an index counter. Each step receives the shared context and the `next` callback. When a step calls `next()`, execution advances to the next registered step. This allows each step to run logic both before and after downstream steps, similar to Express middleware.
